ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, electric, hybrid) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrical_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle from which the reading was taken */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target identifier for the electrical component */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage measured in volts */,
  "current" REAL /* Current measured in amperes */,
  "resistance" REAL /* Resistance measured in ohms */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reading (e.g., battery, alternator) */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Time interval between readings */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the specific sensor used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrical_readings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the alert */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., voltage anomaly, current surge) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostics" (
  "diagnostic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic test */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnostic test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnostic test performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnostic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostics_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "settings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settings entry */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the setting (e.g., alert_threshold) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
